title: dieteria spinulosa
intro: Dieteria spinulosa, also known as prickly phacelia or prickly scorpion weed, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of D. spinulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, D. spinulosa can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
